nasb.text: And He began to teach and say to them, “Is it not written, ‘My house shall be called a house of prayer for all the nations’? But you have made it a robbers’ den.”

esv.text: And he was teaching them and saying to them, “Is it not written, ‘My house shall be called a house of prayer for all the nations’? But you have made it a den of robbers.”

cnv.text: 他又教訓眾人說：“經上不是寫著 ‘我的殿要稱為萬國禱告的殿’嗎？ 你們竟把它弄成賊窩了。”

ccb.text: 祂教导他们说：“圣经上不是记载‘我的殿必称为万民祷告的殿’吗？你们竟把它变成了贼窝。”

csbs.text: 耶稣教导他们说：“经上不是记着‘我的殿将被称为万国祷告的殿’吗？而你们却使它成为贼窝了！”
